title: Wizardcraft
description: Wizardcraft is a Minecraft modpack focused on magic, exploration, and progression. Players learn powerful spells, discover ancient secrets, and grow stronger through sorcery and adventure.
body:
Wizardcraft is a magic-focused Minecraft modpack centered on exploration, progression, and discovery. Players study powerful spells, uncover ancient structures, and master different forms of sorcery while surviving and exploring a dangerous world filled with mystery

IMPORTANT
allocated RAM to the pack game may crash if you do not :(
